subject: Validate: clawd-r0y Rate Limiting (Re-submission with fixes)

acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Allow up to 4 failed login attempts normally
AC-2: Block after 5 failed attempts within 1 minute
AC-3: Display 'Too many login attempts. Please wait 1 minute.'
AC-4: Disable login button during cooldown
AC-5: Return 429 for API requests during cooldown
AC-6: Reset counter after 1 minute cooldown
content.self_validation_notes: Complete re-implementation to match ACs. Fixed: window from 15min to 1min, error message to exact AC text, Retry-After header from 900s to 60s. All 62 rate limiting tests pass. E2E test suite created with screenshot capture. Build passes.
